title: Ophrys akhdarensis
taxonomy: Ophrys akhdarensis is classified as a species of orchid in the family Orchidaceae. It belongs to the genus Ophrys, which is a group of orchids commonly known as bee orchids. The species is native to the Mediterranean region. Ophrys akhdarensis is further classified as Ophrys speciosa subsp. akhdarensis in some taxonomic classifications. However, taxonomy can be complex, and different sources may have varying classifications.
